warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
AMRAP x 10 mins
6m Handstand Walk OR 2 Wall Walks
8 T2B
10 Russian KB Swing 24/16

gymnastics:
HSW Progression
EMOM X 3 20s handstand hold (00:00)
EMOM X 3 180 deg. Conan Walk (on box) x 2 (03:00)
EMOM X 3 5-10 Shoulder taps (or wall walk) (06:00)
EMOM X 5 Tripod Handstand Hold  (09:00)
EMOM X 5 Spotted Freestanding Handstand Hold (14:00)
EMOM X 5 Spotted handstand walk with PVC (19:00)
T2B Bar Progression
EMOM x 3 (24:00)
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3 (27:00)
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 3 (30:00)
Bigger Beat Swing - Push Down on Bar
- Put Ball between feet - Reach Long in the Arch - Dont bend the knees
EMOM x 3 (33:00)
Knees to Chest - Aggressive & Pop - pause
EMOM x 3 (36:00 - 39:00)
Beat Swing with Straight legs - to target
Aim for height without losing tension.
Toes-To-Bar: 2 sets - record biggest unbroken set

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes shoulders, core, and grip via HSW and T2B. Horizontal pulling/pressing builds antagonist balance.

siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: HSW Progression. Gymnastics: Toes-To-Bar: 2 sets - record biggest unbroken set. Metcon: AMRAP 10 minutes: 6m Handstand Walk OR 2 Wall Walks, 8 T2B, 10 Russian KB Swing 24/16. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, back rows, rear delts.
